lines.raw: Lesson 99 | 第99课
Ow! | 哎哟！

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Must Andy go to see the doctor?
lines.raw: Must Andy go to see the doctor? | 安迪必须去看医生吗？
Ow! | 哎哟！
What's the matter, Andy? | 怎么了，安迪？

lines.chinese: 我滑了一下，从楼上摔下来了。
lines.raw: I slipped and fell downstairs. | 我滑了一下，从楼上摔下来了。
Have you hurt yourself? | 你摔伤了吗？
Yes, I have. | 是的，我摔伤了。

lines.english: I think that I've hurt my back.
lines.raw: I think that I've hurt my back. | 我想我伤了背。
Try and stand up. | 试试站起来。
Can you stand up? | 你能站起来吗？
Here. | 来。
Let me help you. | 我来帮你。
I'm sorry, Lucy. | 对不起，露西。

lines.english: I'm afraid that I can't get up.
lines.raw: I'm afraid that I can't get up. | 恐怕我站不起来。

lines.english: I think that the doctor had better see you.
lines.chinese: 我认为你最好去看医生。
lines.raw: I think that the doctor had better see you. | 我认为你最好去看医生。
I'll phone Dr. Carter. | 我给卡特医生打电话。

lines.english: The doctor says that he will come at once.
lines.raw: The doctor says that he will come at once. | 医生说他马上就来。

lines.english: I'm sure that you need an X-ray, Andy.
lines.chinese: 安迪，我肯定你需要拍X光片。
lines.raw: I'm sure that you need an X-ray, Andy. | 安迪，我肯定你需要拍X光片。
